_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to focus research efforts to meet the customer’s decision-making needs.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizational relevance, balancing research rigor with practical applicability.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-A-002 (AB, cosine: 0.481), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.535). Shared vocabulary: [research]. DCWF-only terms [ability, customer, decision, efforts, focus, making] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicability, applied, balancing, clear, designing, executing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.884, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (67.4%). The model interprets "Ability to focus research efforts to meet the customer’s decision-making needs." as logically implying aspects of "Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizati" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.534 ≈ STS 0.535 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [research] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [research]. DCWF-only: [ability, customer, decision, efforts, focus, making]. WIDAI-only: [applicability, applied, balancing, clear, designing, executing].
